title: abutilon tubulosum var. tubulosum
intro: Abutilon tubulosum var. tubulosum, also known as the hairy gourd or Indian mallow, is a plant species in the Malvaceae family, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Abutilon tubulosum var. tubulosum include treating various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Abutilon tubulosum var. tubulosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its roots and leaves can be used in various forms of traditional medicine.
